facebook.caption: Bãi Trường is the kind of beach that earns its reputation quietly. Stretching along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo on the west coast of Phu Quoc, this long, open shoreline delivers soft sand, calm waters, and some of the most stunning sunsets on the island. Rated 4.3/5 across 719 reviews, it's a crowd favorite for good reason. Practical tip: arrive around 5 PM to snag a spot and watch the sky turn gold, then grab a drink at one of the beachside bars nearby.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the waves roll in at Bãi Trường as the afternoon light turns everything golden. This wide, welcoming stretch of coastline on Phu Quoc's west side is pure magic at sunset, and the video does not lie. Come early enough to find your patch of sand before the crowds do.

instagram.caption: Bãi Trường at sunset is something you just have to see in person. Long, golden, and wonderfully relaxed, this is Phu Quoc beach life at its best. Rated 4.3/5 by 719 visitors. Tip: show up around 5 PM for the best light.
instagram.video_caption: Golden hour at Bãi Trường hits different. Long shoreline, soft sand, and a sky that puts on a full show every single evening. This is your sign to be here before sunset.

tiktok.caption: Phu Quoc sunsets hit hardest at Bãi Trường. Get there by 5 PM and thank us later. #PhuQuoc #BaiTruong #VietnamBeach #SunsetTravel

scenes: Arrive by 5 PM for the magic

facebook.caption: If you're looking for a quieter stretch of sand away from the main tourist crowds, Bãi Dài is worth the trip. Located in the north of Phu Quoc, this long, sweeping beach is known for its calm waters, soft white sand, and a laid-back atmosphere that feels a world away from the busier southern shores. It's a great spot to bring a book, take a slow morning swim, or simply watch the fishing boats drift by. Practical tip: arrive before 10 a.m. to claim a good spot and enjoy the beach before the midday heat sets in. Rated 4.2/5 by visitors.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the waves roll gently onto one of Phu Quoc's longest and least crowded beaches. Bãi Dài stretches far into the distance, the sand stays soft underfoot, and the water is calm enough for an easy swim. This is what a slow beach morning in the north of the island actually looks like.

instagram.caption: Long, quiet, and seriously underrated. Bãi Dài sits in the north of Phu Quoc and offers calm water, white sand, and far fewer crowds than the southern beaches. Go early and you might have a whole stretch to yourself.
instagram.video_caption: Soft sand, calm water, and almost nobody around. Bãi Dài in northern Phu Quoc is the slow beach day you actually came here for. Early morning is the sweet spot.

tiktok.caption: The quieter side of Phu Quoc hits different. Bãi Dài is long, calm, and crowd-free. Go early. #PhuQuoc #BaiDai #VietnamTravel #BeachVibes

scenes: Northern Phu Quoc, far fewer crowds
Soft white sand, calm clear water
Great for swimming or just relaxing
Fishing boats drift by in the morning
Best before 10 a.m. for shade and space

facebook.caption: Thom Beach Bar earns its 4.5-star reputation with good reason. Tucked away in Tổ 4, Phú Quốc, this resort hotel blends beachside relaxation with a lively bar atmosphere, giving you the best of both worlds. Whether you are winding down after a day of island exploring or settling in for sunset drinks, the vibe here invites you to slow down and stay a while. Practical tip: book ahead, especially on weekends, as this spot fills up fast with visitors who have clearly read the same 356 glowing reviews.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the light shift at Thom Beach Bar as the afternoon crowd settles in, drinks arrive, and the whole place takes on that golden Phu Quoc glow. This is what a beach bar day actually looks like on the island, relaxed, social, and very hard to leave.

instagram.caption: Beach bar energy meets resort comfort at Thom Beach Bar in Phú Quốc. Rated 4.5 stars across 356 reviews, this is the kind of place you plan to visit for one drink and end up staying for three. Book ahead on weekends.
instagram.video_caption: Drinks in hand, toes near the sand, golden hour doing its thing. Thom Beach Bar is exactly the Phu Quoc afternoon you came here for.

tiktok.caption: 4.5 stars, 356 reviews, one very good reason to stay longer than planned. Thom Beach Bar, Phú Quốc. #PhuQuoc #ThomBeachBar #VietnamTravel #BeachBar

items.placeName: Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: Tucked away on the quieter Ông Lang coast, Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc earns its 4.7-star reputation across more than 3,000 reviews, and it is easy to see why travelers keep coming back. Set along Đường Dinh Bà, the resort sits away from the busier southern beaches, giving guests a more peaceful, lush-feeling escape. Expect well-appointed rooms, a spa worth booking early, and that slower Phu Quoc rhythm that makes a real holiday feel possible. Practical tip: Ông Lang gets busier in peak season (November to March), so lock in your dates ahead of time.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the palms sway, the pool shimmer, and the stress visibly leave people's shoulders. Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc sits on the calm Ông Lang shore, and these clips capture exactly the unhurried pace that 3,000-plus reviewers gave a 4.7-star nod to. This is what the quieter side of Phu Quoc looks like.

instagram.caption: The quieter side of Phu Quoc hits different. Ocean Bay Resort & Spa sits on the peaceful Ông Lang shore, rated 4.7 stars by over 3,000 guests. Lush surroundings, a proper spa, and none of the southern beach crowds. Book early for peak season.
instagram.video_caption: Poolside calm, tropical greenery, and a spa that actually delivers. Ocean Bay Resort & Spa on Ông Lang is your sign to explore Phu Quoc beyond the busy south.

facebook.caption: If you're looking for a beachside bar that actually delivers the full package, OCSEN Beach Bar & Club on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is worth putting on your Phu Quoc itinerary. With a 4.6/5 rating across nearly 5,000 reviews, this spot has clearly earned its reputation with visitors. Expect sand between your toes, cold drinks in hand, and that golden-hour vibe that makes you forget the rest of the world exists. Practical tip: arrive before sunset to snag a good spot, as it gets busy in the evenings.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun melt into the sea while the crowd at OCSEN Beach Bar & Club comes alive. The drinks are flowing, the atmosphere is electric, and the beach setting does all the heavy lifting. This is what a Phu Quoc evening looks like when you get it right.

instagram.caption: Golden hour hits differently at OCSEN Beach Bar & Club. Rated 4.6/5 by nearly 5,000 visitors, this beach bar on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is a Phu Quoc evening done right. Get there early for the best seats.

facebook.caption: Bãi biển Lumera Beach is one of those spots in Phu Quoc that feels a little more polished than your average stretch of sand. Tucked along Trần Hưng Đạo, it earns its 4.4-star rating from visitors who appreciate a clean, well-kept beach without having to venture far from the main strip. Whether you're after a relaxed morning swim or a sunset with your toes in the sand, Lumera delivers a reliable, pleasant experience. Practical tip: arrive earlier in the day to secure a good spot before the afternoon crowd builds up.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the light hit the water at Bãi biển Lumera Beach and you'll understand why visitors keep coming back. The sand is clean, the setting is easy to reach on Trần Hưng Đạo, and the whole vibe just invites you to slow down. A solid 4.4 stars for good reason.

instagram.caption: Clean sand, calm water, and a location right on Trần Hưng Đạo. Bãi biển Lumera Beach is a go-to for visitors who want a well-kept beach without the trek. Rated 4.4 stars and worth every bit of it. Tip: go early for the best spot.
instagram.video_caption: Sand, sea, and good vibes at Bãi biển Lumera Beach. One of Phu Quoc's tidier beach spots, easy to reach, and genuinely relaxing. Your morning swim sorted.

facebook.caption: Tucked away on the quieter Ông Lang coast, Phu Quoc Eco Beach Resort earns its 4.6-star reputation with a laid-back beachfront vibe that bigger resorts rarely manage to pull off. Expect an outdoor pool steps from the sand, an open-air restaurant for breezy seaside meals, a spa to melt away travel fatigue, and a gym if you still feel motivated. It is the kind of place where your schedule genuinely has nothing on it. Practical tip: Ông Lang beach sits on the west side of the island, so you get some of Phu Quoc's most beautiful sunsets right from the resort.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the hammocks sway, the pool shimmer, and the waves do absolutely nothing stressful at Phu Quoc Eco Beach Resort. This open-air, beachfront escape on Ông Lang beach is exactly what a proper island slowdown looks like, complete with a spa, a gym, and sunset views that will rearrange your priorities.

instagram.caption: Quiet beach, open-air dining, and a pool that practically begs you to do nothing. Phu Quoc Eco Beach Resort on Ông Lang beach is a 4.6-star slowdown on the west coast, and those sunset views are the real amenity.
instagram.video_caption: Pool. Beach. Spa. Sunset. Phu Quoc Eco Beach Resort on Ông Lang beach is giving full island-reset energy, and we are completely here for it.

tiktok.caption: West coast, best coast. Phu Quoc Eco Beach Resort on Ông Lang beach = pool, spa, open-air eats, and insane sunsets. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #BeachResort #OngLang

facebook.caption: Free Beach Resort Phu Quoc sits right on the beach along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, offering a laid-back stay that suits travelers who want sand at their doorstep without the resort price tag. Rooms and bungalows are simple and clean, the beachside eatery means you barely need to leave, and motorcycle rentals on-site make exploring the island genuinely easy. Rated 4/5 across 482 reviews, it earns its score through good vibes and a great location. Practical tip: book a bungalow over a standard room if you want that classic tropical feel.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the waves roll in just steps from your bungalow door. The clips say it all: casual beachfront living, cold drinks at the on-site eatery, and a motorbike ready to take you anywhere on the island. Free Beach Resort Phu Quoc keeps things simple, and honestly, that is exactly the point.

instagram.caption: Beachfront without the big bill. Free Beach Resort Phu Quoc offers cozy bungalows, a laid-back eatery, and motorbike rentals right on site. Rated 4/5 by nearly 500 travelers. Simple, honest, and exactly where you want to wake up.
instagram.video_caption: Sand, sea, and a motorbike waiting outside your bungalow. Free Beach Resort Phu Quoc is the no-fuss beach stay you actually come to Phu Quoc for.

tiktok.caption: Beachfront bungalows, a chill eatery, and a motorbike to explore Phu Quoc. Free Beach Resort keeps it simple and delivers. #PhuQuoc #BeachResort #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

facebook.caption: Looking for a meal with a view in Phu Quoc? THE PEAK PHU QUOC, sitting in the heart of Duong Dong, has earned its 4.4/5 rating across 848 reviews for good reason. Perched above the town, it offers foreign visitors a chance to slow down, eat well, and take in the surroundings that make this island so memorable. Go around sunset for the best light and atmosphere, and consider booking ahead on weekends since popular spots in Duong Dong fill up fast.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the views open up as we make our way through THE PEAK PHU QUOC. The setting does a lot of the talking here, and the food keeps pace with the scenery. This is the kind of spot you stumble onto and immediately text your travel group about.

instagram.caption: Dinner with a view in Phu Quoc hits different at THE PEAK PHU QUOC. Rated 4.4/5 by nearly 850 visitors, this Duong Dong gem is worth every step up. Pro tip: go at sunset.

facebook.caption: Tucked along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Thanh Kieu Beach Resort earns its 4.4-star rating from nearly 1,000 guests for good reason. It sits right on Phu Quoc's coastline, giving you that classic island holiday feel without having to travel far from the main strip. Whether you're after a relaxing base for beach days or a comfortable spot to return to after exploring the island, this resort delivers solid value. Practical tip: book a sea-facing room to make the most of the views, especially at sunset.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun drop behind the South China Sea from the grounds of Thanh Kieu Beach Resort. The clips show exactly what draws nearly 1,000 reviewers to rate this place a 4.4, from the beachfront setting to the easygoing resort atmosphere along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. This is what a Phu Quoc beach holiday actually looks like.

instagram.caption: Beachfront views, a 4.4 rating from nearly 1,000 guests, and a prime spot on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Thanh Kieu Beach Resort is the kind of place Phu Quoc beach holidays are made of. Pro tip: ask for a sea-facing room.
instagram.video_caption: Sand, sea, and a resort that actually lives up to the hype. Thanh Kieu Beach Resort on Phu Quoc's Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, rated 4.4 by nearly 1,000 travelers. Your next island base, sorted.

facebook.caption: Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of place that earns its name every single evening. Rated 4.3/5 across more than 2,100 reviews, this beach bar clearly does something right. Pull up a seat as the sky turns gold over the water, order a cold drink, and let the whole afternoon slow down around you. Practical tip: arrive at least 30 minutes before sunset to grab a good spot, especially on weekends.
facebook.video_caption: Watch that sky go from blue to full gold right from your barstool. Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant brings together cold drinks, soft sand underfoot, and a crowd that knows exactly why they came here. Over 2,100 happy guests on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo can't be wrong.

instagram.caption: Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, rated 4.3/5 by 2,100+ guests. Show up early, grab a beachfront seat, and let the sky do the rest. This is Phu Quoc at its most golden.

items.placeName: Bãi 3 Cây Dừa (Three Coconus Tree Beach) Longbeach

facebook.caption: Tucked along the famous Long Beach strip, Bãi 3 Cây Dừa earns its name from the three coconut palms that have become a quiet landmark for those who know where to look. This laid-back stretch of sand sits right off Trần Hưng Đạo, making it easy to reach on foot or by motorbike. With a 4.2/5 rating from visitors, it offers a more relaxed alternative to the busier sections of Long Beach. Come early morning for calm water and soft light, and bring cash for any beachside vendors nearby.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the waves roll in at Bãi 3 Cây Dừa, where three coconut palms frame one of Long Beach's most charming little pockets of sand. Flip-flops off, toes in the water, no crowds pulling you in any direction. This is the Phu Quoc beach day you actually came for.

instagram.caption: Three palms. One quiet beach. Zero regrets. Bãi 3 Cây Dừa on Long Beach is a breezy little escape right off Trần Hưng Đạo, rated 4.2/5 by visitors. Hit it at sunrise before the day heats up.
instagram.video_caption: Three coconut palms, soft sand, and the kind of slow morning that makes you forget your schedule. Bãi 3 Cây Dừa on Long Beach is giving exactly what Phu Quoc promised.

tiktok.caption: The chill beach spot on Long Beach that most tourists walk right past. Bãi 3 Cây Dừa deserves a stop. #PhuQuoc #LongBeach #VietnamTravel #BeachTok
